## Meeting Purpose

[Review ICP and sprint pipeline, discuss deal progress, and address operational challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline is progressing well with several promising deals (Red, Cresta, Viscom, Read.ai, Hex)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Extending sprint durations to 10-12 weeks for December starts to accommodate holidays and complex projects](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Need to refine ICP qualification process to avoid problematic clients (e.g., SpecterOps, Navan)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Focus on streamlining sales process and improving inbound lead qualification before diving deeper into SEO/GEO expertise](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Update

  - [Red signed (30-18 standard editorial setup)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Cresta progressing well (9K for phase two)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Viscom and Read.ai as solid backups for November 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Strategic logos (Zapier, Kirkland, Ramp, Webflow) progressing, targeting December 1st](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Navan experiencing procurement challenges (MSA, DPA complications)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Sprint Duration Adjustments

  - [Extending sprints to 10 weeks for December 1st, 8th, and 17th starts](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Considering 12-week sprints for more complex projects (e.g., Ramp, Navan)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Rationale: Holiday season impact and need for extended timelines on certain projects](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Example: DeepGram in week 7 without full results, would benefit from 12 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### ICP Qualification Challenges

  - [SpecterOps highlighted as a problematic client due to:](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [Highly technical, security-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Lack of brand guidelines, voice, tone, or style documentation](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [Multiple stakeholders required for content approval (CTO, CEO, CPO, Product Marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [Desire to reposition with a new, unsearched perspective](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Discussion on potentially disqualifying similar clients in the future](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Need for more thorough pre-qualification process](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)

### Sales Process Improvements

  - [Exploring options for quick proof-of-concept content creation](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Debate on the feasibility and value of creating sample content pre-sprint](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Focus on improving artifact generation, site audits, and SEO/GEO audits pre-sprint](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Suggestion to prioritize other sales process improvements before diving deeper into SEO/GEO expertise](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Inbound Lead Management

  - [Proposal to implement an application form on the website](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Automate initial screening process to reduce manual effort](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Improve lead quality and reduce time spent on unqualified prospects](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to score SpecterOps against ICP dimensions and provide a write-up](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Tyler to work with Bridget on refining the NetRix opportunity evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Team to collaboratively develop questions for the "Apply to work with us" form](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Explore automation options for initial lead screening (potentially using Clay)](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Tyler to continue bringing in Marcel for closing high-priority deals](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Bridget to discuss ICP adherence and upfront payment policies with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/i7JTi7wubpFvJbLcJH1XxWa12f6-gDvx?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
